name: Same-Day Reschedule After Missed Installer Window
description: A terse customer says the installer never showed up and wants to know whether a same-day appointment is still possible. The scenario tests scheduling support, concise questioning, and clear next-step communication.
initialMessage: Tech never came for my 10-12 window. Can you get someone out today or not?
expectedOutcome: The agent acknowledges the missed appointment, gathers the minimum needed scheduling details, and provides a clear rescheduling or callback next step without drifting into unrelated troubleshooting.
expectedMilestones: Same-day availability or alternative next step explained
